channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-15
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. Notably, the `scienceverse/metacheck` project has been actively updated, with merges from the `dev` branch to the `main` branch, including the addition of a Zenodo citation. Meanwhile, `giladfeldman/docpluck` has released version "v2.4.90", featuring a new "per-band region-aware two-column re-extraction" feature, and `giladfeldman/escicheck` has been synced with the latest versions of effectcheck. Additionally, `Davidvandijcke/coarse` has added a CodeQL analysis workflow configuration, and `JamieCummins/regcheck` has improved report viewing and added quality of life features. These updates demonstrate the connections and collaborations within our community, with projects like `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` also making strides, revising validation notes and including citations to further enhance research tools. Overall, it's an exciting time for our community, with many projects pushing forward and building upon each other's progress.

82 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

New releases: metacheck v0.1.0-beta

Most active:

metacheck32 commits
regcheck19 commits
docpluck18 commits
coarse12 commits
auto-zcurve1 commits

item.title: metacheck: 6 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `main` branch was updated with a merge from the `dev` branch via pull request #312. Work was done on the `dev` branch to add a "zenodo citation", as stated in the commit message. The `dev` branch also received an update to "apps and docs", according to the commit message. Additionally, the `dev` branch was updated with a merge from the `main` branch via pull request #310, and then merged into the `main` branch. The `main` branch was also updated with a merge from the `dev` branch via pull request #311.

6 commit(s) today:

  • a7dea29 [main] Merge pull request #312 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • f09fb47 [dev] zenodo citation — Lisa DeBruine
  • 00eaa3b [main] Merge pull request #311 from scienceverse/dev — Lisa DeBruine
  • 767da17 [dev] update apps and docs — Lisa DeBruine
  • 9d012e7 [dev] Merge pull request #310 from nielsvanberkel/main — Lisa DeBruine
  • 8a605a3 [dev] Merge branch 'dev' into main — Lisa DeBruine

New release: v0.1.0-beta — Metacheck beta 0.1.0

View all commits →

item.title: docpluck: 8 commits today
item.description:
giladfeldman/docpluck

Work was done on the 'main' branch. The documentation was updated to include "cycle-2 learnings" and a "word-preservation-guard-is-the-safety" as part of "RC-1 Step 2". A feature was added for "per-band region-aware two-column re-extraction" in version "v2.4.90", referred to as "ship-dark". The documentation was also updated to reflect the "handoff" of "RC-1 Step 2 first cut shipped" and to correct the "handoff deploy-state row", as well as to include "cycle-1 B7" learnings and lessons. A fix was implemented to "recover dropped-minus coefficients from the layout channel" in version "v2.4.89", and the documentation was updated to "sync iterate spine to I1-I12" and to "harden deploy preflight". Additionally, a test was added to "assert audit input PDF byte-equal to pinned feed" as part of "R-0003".

8 commit(s) today:

  • 818c3d0 [main] docs(iterate): cycle-2 learnings — RC-1 Step 2 + word-preservation-guard-is-the-safety — Gilad Feldman
  • da6c90f [main] docs(iterate): handoff — RC-1 Step 2 first cut shipped (v2.4.90, ship-dark) — Gilad Feldman
  • 1325d14 [main] feat(v2.4.90): RC-1 Step 2 -- per-band region-aware two-column re-extraction (ship-dark) — Gilad Feldman
  • 5782c6c [main] docs(iterate): correct handoff deploy-state row — main push HELD (local only) — Gilad Feldman
  • dca0e32 [main] docs(iterate): cycle-1 B7 (v2.4.89) learnings + lessons + resume handoff + TRIAGE — Gilad Feldman
  • 44f4ccd [main] fix(v2.4.89): B7 W0h -- recover dropped-minus coefficients from the layout channel — Gilad Feldman
  • 2cc32d9 [main] docs(skills): sync iterate spine to I1-I12 + extract parallelization ref; harden deploy preflight — Gilad Feldman
  • 548d6df [main] test(canary): assert audit input PDF byte-equal to pinned feed (R-0003) — Gilad Feldman

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 2 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the focus of the recent work, with the first commit updating the model requirements. As stated in the commit message, the model requirements were specifically "update[d]" by Jamie Cummins. In the second commit on the staging branch, report viewing was "improve[d]" and quality of life (QOL) features were added. The commit messages do not provide further details on the specific changes made to the model requirements or the QOL features. The staging branch is the only branch that was worked on in these commits. The changes made by Jamie Cummins were limited to these two updates on the staging branch.

2 commit(s) today:

  • 9074b4b [staging] update model reqs — Jamie Cummins
  • 76b8a02 [staging] improve report viewing + qol features — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
